user.title: Connect Shul Zmanim
user.description: Paste the link to your Google Sheet. First share it as "Anyone with the link → Viewer" (Share button, top right of the sheet).

error.invalid_url: That doesn't look like a Google Sheets URL.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the sheet. Make sure it's shared as "Anyone with the link → Viewer".
error.missing_columns: The sheet is missing required columns (Day, Zman, Time).
